---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused document, OKR, diagnostic, platform, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user workflow or failure mode should improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the command, output, dry-run plan, or conversion behavior you expect.

## Scope

- Command or source type:
- Platform: macOS / Windows / both
- Changes remote mutation behavior: yes / no
- Changes destructive behavior: yes / no

## Safety Considerations

Explain how the proposal protects cookies, tokens, private URLs, identifiers, generated artifacts, and user content.

## Alternatives Considered

List any smaller workflow or documentation-only alternative.
